vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of severe degradation. The registry is largely non-representative of the current physical state.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: White rabbit anchor is present, but the Pothos is absent/shriveled beyond recognition.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface, no signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface, no signs of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit figurine remains, but the host plant is absent.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface, no signs of Silver Guest.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears desiccated and dark; no evidence of moisture or active root systems.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of a spoon in T-4 and T-1, and a cylindrical object (possibly a sensor or marker) in T-5, T-4, T-3, and T-1.

temporal_deltas.EARLIEST_to_T-5: Initial state shows empty pots with some debris.
temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-3: Introduction of a spoon and a sensor marker; no plant growth observed.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_CURRENT: Removal of the spoon and marker; pots remain barren.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. There is no evidence of living botanical specimens. The environment appears to be a dormant or failed cultivation setup.
anomalies: Introduction of a metal spoon (T-4, T-1).
Introduction of a sensor/marker stake (T-5, T-4, T-3, T-1).
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete failure of the botanical registry. Across the five-day sequence, no plant life is visible in any of the designated pots. The presence of a spoon and a sensor stake suggests human intervention or an attempt at monitoring, but the biological components (P1-P4) are entirely missing or have suffered total systemic loss. The desk surface is clean but devoid of any active growth.
